creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 217842
micro-2.0.7.diff

* Whilst here pet portclippy.
* Add `DEBUG` to `OPTIONS_DEFINE`,
  which enables debug logging.
* General cleanup and housekeeping.

Changelog:

 * https://github.com/zyedidia/micro/releases/v2.0.7

 * testport: OK (poudriere: 12.1-RELEASE-p8, amd64).

MFH: No (Feature changes).
